response.justification: Mohammed Al-Said brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows at re:cinq), but falls significantly short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. There is no demonstrated AI thought leadership, no recognized expertise in building AI-powered products at scale, no cloud platform strategy experience, and no track record of advising strategic enterprise customers — all of which are core to the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) function.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, infrastructure, and low-latency systems demonstrates strong technical breadth
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform actively used by NGOs, showing product ownership beyond employment
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq is directionally relevant to the AI focus of the role
concerns: AI expertise is limited to approximately one year of recent exposure; no history of shipping recognized AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No cloud platform strategy or enterprise advisory experience — the role requires advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption at a director level

No evidence of director-level influence, executive stakeholder engagement, public AI thought leadership, research publications, or conference keynotes that would signal the seniority this IC role requires

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or director-level IC experience
